benefits.description: Significant weight loss (100+ lbs over course of treatment)

side_effects.description: Injection site reactions including redness and itching
Dry skin patches that improve temporarily with castor oil but return

protocol_notes: Used pharmaceutical Tirzepatide directly from Lily before insurance coverage ended. Injection site reactions improved with alcohol cleaning before and after injection. Rotated injection sites. Uses castor oil for dry patches. Considers side effects acceptable trade-off for weight loss results.
